key_finding: TEXT DOMINATES KV: Text-cumulative baseline R=0.52-0.75 beats KV probes (R=-0.04 to 0.38) at ALL 10 positions and both layers. No early decodability gap (0 deciles). The cumulative mean of token embeddings — which accumulates problem number tokens from early in the chain — is far more predictive of the final answer than any single KV vector. Critical design limitation: asymmetric comparison (cumulative text aggregating hundreds of tokens vs single-position KV vector). Does NOT rule out early decodability through cumulative KV or hidden states.
evidence_impact: WEAK evidence against early decodability (specific single-position form). The null is clear but the design has an identified asymmetry. The result is CONSISTENT with exp_071-073 showing answer info concentrates at computation positions (=), not uniformly across the chain. The text-cumulative baseline's strength (R=0.52 at 10%) comes from problem numbers appearing early in generated text. Follow-up with cumulative KV probe (fair comparison) is the highest priority.
next_planned: Cumulative KV probe — mean of all KV vectors up to position P, vs cumulative text at same position. This removes the asymmetry and enables a fair apples-to-apples comparison of aggregate KV vs aggregate text information.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: PROBING AT COMPUTATION POSITIONS: V R=0.977, gap +0.206 over expr-embed (moderate-strong). EARLY DECODABILITY: text >> single-position KV at all positions (design limitation). BEHAVIORAL: paraphrase uninformative (format confound). CUMULATIVE KV PROBE needed for fair test.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families for computation-position probing.
